Once a biologist, always a biologist

February 27, 2025

In my undergrad, I studied Biology. Although I specialized in cellular biology, I did spend a good time enjoying nature. Don’t believe me? Look at these pictures:

Here is a picture of me petting a baby snake :3

And another one of me catching bugs as a true biologist! 🐛🐛

And finally, the typical tree-hugging biologist 💟
